articles.title: Lower colorectal cancer screening age to 45 from 50, Canadian Cancer Society urges
articles.description: TORONTO — Michael Groves thought he had appendicitis. In January 2021, he went to the emergency department with abdominal pains, but after testing, medical staff ruled it out and he went home. A couple of days later, Groves, who lives in Ottawa, saw blood in his stool, so he told his family doctor.
